Deploy order:     1. PerpPriceOracle  \u2014 price feed (admin is keeper by default)     2. FundingRate      \u2014 8-hour funding calculator     3. MarginVault      \u2014 G$ collateral vault (linked to engine after step 4)     4. PerpEngine       \u2014 core trading engine (vault + funding + oracle wired in constructor)     5. Wire FundingRate.setPerpEngine(engine)     6. Wire MarginVault.setPerpEngine(engine)     7. Seed 6 markets: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, MATIC, ARB   Environment:     PRIVATE_KEY  \u2014 deployer private key     GD_TOKEN     \u2014 GoodDollar token address (defaults to current devnet address)     FEE_SPLITTER \u2014 UBIFeeSplitter address (defaults to current devnet
